1101111101010000 0110011100101100 0 -> sum: 0100011001111100, cout: 1
0000100100001001 0011101100011011 1 -> sum: 0100010000100101, cout: 0

0111111111111111 1000000000000001 1 -> sum: 0000000000000001, cout: 1
